в•°в”ҲвһӨ In the tags, but I don't wan this warning missed: NONCON!! FORCED CHEATING!!! Forced cuckolding if that's a thing, NSFW INTRO!

вң§. в”Ҡ вҒӯ "Unorthodox Punishment"

вң§. в”Ҡ вҒӯ Your husband pissed Negan off, but instead of harming the man physically, he does so emotionally by fucking you in front of him

гҖҺ вҶівң§пҪҘпҫҹ Was debating on posting this, but ended up doing so anyway. Ill be working on requests soon, I just wanted to get personal bots out and done, too. I have plenty that I just never made bc I was so request-focused ;

NOT very proofread! So of the grammar is slightly off that's my bad lol. Hope this works out, I added to the scenario section in hopes the bot will remember easier lol

вҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣвҳ…в—Ӣ

This is...So self-indulgent lol. obviously I don't really wanna cheat on anyone (ew), but this is fiction for a reason. (I DO, however, want Negan to tie me up and pin me down tee hee рҹӨӯ). I came up with this idea when NTR hate started to surface super super badly, and I sort of wasn't sure if this counted, so I got too scared to actually make it oofie

EXTRA STUFF

I'm starting up school again on the 13th! I'm only taking 3 classes this time to give myself a break bc I failed a few last time. I didn't realize you were meant to take less classes per semester in college рҹҘІ Literally lost sleep trying to keep up, and I'm NOT doing that shit again.

ALSO!! I'm going to be doing a fallout collab! I'm posting my bots for that on my second account, so go look there if you want to see them come out. ill probably be posting one or two today (especially bc a couple are just the male/female versions of each other) :)

ЛҡаӯЁаӯ§вӢҶпҪЎЛҡ вӢҶ BEFORE LEAVING A REVIEW вӢҶ ЛҡпҪЎвӢҶаӯЁаӯ§Лҡ

вқҘ I can't control if the bot talks for you! That's usually a JLLM issue: Just delete the parts where it talks for you (it learns from previous chats) or be more detailed in responses. Also mess around with the generation settings!

вқҘ I can't control if the bot repeats itself! That might also be JLLM! If it does this, you may need to mess with the generation settings. I would also try deleting the parts where it repeats if it's a certain phrase they keep saying over and over.

вқҘ If you dislike the bot, I'd like to know why. Obviously, you have the right to stay quiet, but it'll help me improve if I know what's wrong!

Thank you!
creator: Dreemy_Dreemz
